title: Cygnus B system

The '''Cygnus B system''',<ref name="Jungle" /> also referred to as the '''Cygnus system''',<ref name="TEA" /> was located in the [[Esaga sector/Legends|Esaga sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Star system/Legends|system]] shared its name with the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus Spaceworks]]. That company was based in the [[Cygnus Star Empire]], a small collection of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] situated along the Mid Rim's [[Oktos Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that were believed by the [[xenolinguist]] [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Milanda Vorgan]] to have been ceded as a bribe by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Clan-General]] [[Kossak Inijic Ar'durv]] to the allies of<ref name="Written">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/writtenword/index.html?page=1|text=The Written Word|int=The Written Word}}</ref> the [[Hutt Empire]]'s<ref name="TEA" /> enemy [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] during the [[Xim Wars|conflict]] between Xim and the Hutts<ref name="Written" /> twenty-five [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="TEA" />

The Cygnus B system was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to [[giant algae-bed]]s—immobile, [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|life-forms]] that were classified as a [[super-brain]].<ref name="Jungle" /> By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="date">The events of "[[Cantina Communications]]" take place during [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi's]] visit to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], which is depicted in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars:'' Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], a young [[Gender/Legends|man]] from<ref name="Poster">{{StoryCite|story=Cantina Communications|book=Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16}}</ref> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] planet<ref name="TEA" /> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], had seen pictures of the giant algae-beds from the Cygnus B system.<ref name="Poster" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Cygnus B system was created by [[John Chesterman]] for "[[Cantina Communications]]," a one-page vignette included in the [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16|sixteenth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly]]'' magazine, published in [[1979]] by [[Paradise Press]].<ref name="Poster" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' provided a shortened designation for the system and placed it in grid square R-11.<ref name="TEA" />
